audit_scope: Static audit and offline recomputation of the complete official repository snapshot pinned at fb32377518353898a3600ba871639854dc6a4389. No model-backed framework matrix, production deployment, or SWE-bench harvest was rerun.

offline_environment.method: Fresh temporary Python virtual environment; installed pinned requirements.txt; commands run from the archived repository root.

recomputed_results.verify_expected: PASS: main table (8 frameworks, 240 runs), heterogeneous strict-joint cells (16), and exact-scene meter calibration; script printed ALL VERIFICATIONS PASSED.
recomputed_results.r_scorer_validation: PASS on intended coarse grades, including zero retention, aggregate blob, truncated observations, and summary-only stores. The released automated scorer intentionally remains insensitive to shuffled order and missing tool arguments; the paper relies on a separate proxy/extractor reconstruction contract for those properties.

released_growth_recomputation.note: The pinned public snapshot contains only seed 1 for the three repeated full-history frameworks, not the paper's s2/s3 records.

supported: The released 240 main file-QA records recompute the eight-framework main table.
The released heterogeneous records recompute 16 strict joint-success cells.
Synthetic serialization calibration regenerates the paper's exact-duplication and masking patterns.
Seventy CAS reports cover ten first-repetition records for each of seven persisting frameworks; all report zero restore failures, and the compact CAS rescore table preserves each coarse R grade.
Six framework-specific reconstructed-history JSON files are present.
not_fully_supported_by_public_snapshot: The paper reports 1,061 sandboxes, but the public snapshot does not contain every reported run root or measurement record; notably s2/s3 growth records, six of seven batched fixed-trace framework records, and the representative raw stores described in SUPPLEMENTARY_README.md are absent.
MANIFEST.txt, explicitly cited for version alignment, is absent from the pinned public snapshot.
The complete 194-call proxy request archive and per-call reconstruction diffs described in the paper are not present as an auditable one-to-one ground-truth bundle.
The benchmark card says the published legacy accounting was audited on 501 runs, while the paper and Appendix N say 509 main-study sandboxes.
Production-scale and operator-attested deployment claims cannot be independently reproduced from de-identified aggregate JSON alone.

claim_ceiling: The audit supports inspectability and partial offline recomputation of the released metric and result surface. It does not reproduce the full 1,061-run study, establish causal framework effects, validate production prevalence or efficiency, prove complete audit/recovery utility, or show that coarse history reconstruction preserves every persistence capability.
